notes: Chunk 66 DONE (Template A, Tier B, 25 routes - upgraded existing stubs): FR/DE/IT/ES/NL/BE/PT to DR/JM/PA/UY. DR: DGAG, no titre test, no quarantine, 4-6 weeks. JM: VSD import permit 8-12w + 14-day Plumb Point quarantine + titre test, high complexity. PA: MIDA, no titre, Panamanian Embassy authentication required in each origin capital, 5-8 weeks. UY: MGAP permit + praziquantel, FAVN+90-day wait for all EU pets, 6-10 weeks. All routes use correct destination authority names and local authority codes for export. Next: Chunk 67 (Template B, Tier B). Blog Day 25 after.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
